title: 最後三分鐘

scenes.location: 戶外花園婚禮現場——白色花亭
scenes.location_en: Outdoor garden wedding venue — white floral arch
scenes.action_zh: 特寫：一隻纖細的手顫抖著舉起交杯酒。鏡頭快速拉開——蘇晚身穿白色魚尾婚紗，黑色長髮盤成精緻新娘髮髻，站在花亭下。對面是身穿黑色三件式西裝禮服、胸口別著白玫瑰胸花的陸深。兩人四目相對，蘇晚的唇角帶笑，但眼底一片冰冷。畫外音低語：「從這一刻起，你只剩三分鐘。」
scenes.action_en: Close-up: a slender hand trembles as it raises a champagne coupe. Camera pulls back fast — Su Wan in a white mermaid wedding gown, black hair in a bridal updo, stands beneath the floral arch. Facing her is Lu Shen in a black three-piece tuxedo with a white rose boutonniere. Their eyes meet; Su Wan's lips smile, but her gaze is ice-cold. Voiceover whispers: 'From this moment, you have three minutes.'
scenes.dialogue_zh: 蘇晚（畫外音）：從這一刻起，你只剩三分鐘。
scenes.dialogue_en: Su Wan (V.O.): From this moment, you have three minutes.
scenes.emotion: 表面神聖甜蜜，暗藏殺意

scenes.location_en: Under the floral arch — vow exchange
scenes.action_zh: 中景：蘇晚深情凝視陸深，念出誓詞。陸深面帶儒雅微笑，輕握她的手。蘇晚婚紗腰間繡有暗紋的細節一閃而過。此時蘇晚腰側手機震動，螢幕微光閃爍。她眼皮微顫，但聲音不變，繼續念完最後一句誓詞。
scenes.action_en: Medium shot: Su Wan gazes at Lu Shen lovingly, reciting her vows. Lu Shen smiles elegantly, gently holding her hand. A brief flash of the hidden monogram embroidery at her gown's waist. Her phone vibrates at her side; the screen flickers. Her eyelid twitches almost imperceptibly, but her voice stays steady as she finishes the last line.
scenes.dialogue_zh: 蘇晚：……無論順境逆境，我都願與你共度餘生。
scenes.dialogue_en: Su Wan: ...for better or for worse, I will spend the rest of my life with you.

scenes.location: 花亭下——蘇晚低頭看手機
scenes.location_en: Under the floral arch — Su Wan glances at phone
scenes.action_zh: 特寫：蘇晚趁賓客鼓掌的瞬間，低頭瞥向手機螢幕。訊息內容佔滿畫面：「新郎殺了你姐姐，證據在他西裝內袋。」她的瞳孔收縮，手指微微收緊，但下一秒她抬起頭，臉上重新掛上完美笑容。
scenes.action_en: Close-up: amid guest applause, Su Wan glances down at her phone. The message fills the frame: 'The groom killed your sister. The evidence is in his jacket pocket.' Her pupils contract; her fingers tighten slightly. But in the next beat she looks up, a flawless smile back in place.
scenes.dialogue_zh: （無台詞，手機文字：新郎殺了你姐姐，證據在他西裝內袋。）
scenes.dialogue_en: (No dialogue. Phone text: The groom killed your sister. The evidence is in his jacket pocket.)

scenes.location_en: Under the floral arch — wine exchange
scenes.action_zh: 過肩鏡頭：蘇晚端起交杯酒，優雅地靠近陸深。她以敬酒的姿態湊近他耳邊，嘴唇幾乎貼著他的耳廓。陸深的笑容僵住，瞳孔劇烈震動，但他強行維持鎮定，低聲回應。兩人碰杯，酒液晃動。
scenes.action_en: Over-shoulder: Su Wan lifts the wine coupe and elegantly leans toward Lu Shen. Under the guise of a toast, her lips nearly touch his ear as she whispers. Lu Shen's smile freezes; his pupils shake violently, but he forces composure and whispers back. They clink glasses; the wine trembles.
scenes.dialogue_zh:
蘇晚（低語）：姐姐失蹤那天……你在哪裡？
陸深（低語，強裝鎮定）：晚晚，你在說什麼？今天是我們的大日子。
scenes.dialogue_en:
Su Wan (whisper): The day my sister disappeared... where were you?
Lu Shen (whisper, feigning calm): Wan, what are you talking about? Today is our big day.
scenes.lighting: dramatic — contrast between warm ambient and cold shadow

scenes.location_en: In front of the arch — facing guest seating
scenes.action_zh: 廣角：蘇晚轉身面對賓客席與香檳塔，舉杯致詞。她的聲音溫柔感恩，話鋒漸漸轉向回憶。背景中陸深的表情逐漸凝固。蘇晚提到「兩年前失蹤的姐姐蘇遙」，賓客開始竊竊私語，氣氛微妙轉變。
scenes.action_en: Wide shot: Su Wan turns to face the guests and champagne tower, raising her glass for a speech. Her voice is warm and grateful, then gradually shifts to reminiscence. Behind her, Lu Shen's expression slowly freezes. Su Wan mentions 'my sister Su Yao, who disappeared two years ago.' Guests begin to murmur; the atmosphere shifts.
scenes.dialogue_zh: 蘇晚：感謝所有人見證這一刻。但今天，我想讓一個無法到場的人……也被記住。我的姐姐，蘇遙——她兩年前失蹤了。（停頓）她最後一次被人看見的時候……戴著一條很特別的項鏈。
scenes.dialogue_en: Su Wan: Thank you all for witnessing this moment. But today, I want someone who couldn't be here... to also be remembered. My sister, Su Yao — she disappeared two years ago. (pause) The last time anyone saw her... she was wearing a very special necklace.
scenes.emotion: 感恩轉為沉重，氣氛壓迫

scenes.location: 花亭前——蘇晚與陸深面對面
scenes.location_en: In front of the arch — Su Wan faces Lu Shen
scenes.action_zh: 中景轉特寫：蘇晚放下酒杯，轉向陸深。她伸出手，動作輕柔卻不容拒絕，探入陸深黑色三件式西裝的胸口內袋，取出一條項鏈。鏡頭特寫項鏈——與手機中蘇遙紅色洋裝照片裡的項鏈完全一致。賓客席爆發驚呼。陸深臉色慘白，後退一步，嘴唇顫抖。
scenes.action_en: Medium to close-up: Su Wan sets down her glass and turns to Lu Shen. Her hand reaches out — gentle yet undeniable — and slips into the inner pocket of his black three-piece tuxedo. She pulls out a necklace. Close-up on the necklace — identical to the one Su Yao wore in her red-dress photo. Gasps erupt from the guests. Lu Shen's face drains of color; he stumbles back, lips trembling.
scenes.dialogue_zh:
蘇晚（聲音平靜如水）：這條項鏈……是姐姐失蹤那天戴的。（轉向賓客）它為什麼……在我丈夫的口袋裡？
陸深（崩潰）：不……這不是……你不明白——！
scenes.dialogue_en:
Su Wan (voice calm as still water): This necklace... is the one my sister wore the day she vanished. (turns to guests) Why... was it in my husband's pocket?
Lu Shen (breaking down): No... this isn't... you don't understand—!
scenes.camera_angle: medium → extreme close-up on necklace → wide reaction

scenes.location_en: Under the floral arch — Lu Shen's breakdown
scenes.action_zh: 手持晃動鏡頭：陸深試圖搶回項鏈，動作粗暴地暴露了他的真實面目。賓客驚恐後退。蘇晚紋絲不動地站在原地，白色魚尾婚紗在風中微擺。她居高臨下看著陸深，眼神冰冷無波。陸深跌坐在地，雙手抱頭。
scenes.action_en: Handheld shaky cam: Lu Shen lunges to snatch the necklace back, his violent motion shattering his genteel facade. Guests recoil in horror. Su Wan stands utterly still, her white mermaid gown swaying slightly in the breeze. She looks down at Lu Shen with frozen, waveless eyes. He collapses to the ground, head in hands.
scenes.dialogue_zh:
陸深（嘶吼）：你設計我——！你從一開始就——
蘇晚（冰冷）：從一開始？不。（停頓）是從姐姐消失的那一天開始。
scenes.dialogue_en:
Lu Shen (screaming): You set me up—! From the very start you—
Su Wan (ice-cold): From the start? No. (pause) From the day my sister disappeared.

scenes.location_en: In front of the arch — final twist
scenes.action_zh: 鏡頭緩緩推向蘇晚的臉部特寫。她微微一笑——不是新娘的幸福笑容，而是獵人收網的冷笑。畫面疊化為一週前的畫面：蘇晚坐在昏暗房間裡，對著錄音筆說話，手邊攤開陸深的行程表和姐姐的失蹤報告。最後畫面回到婚禮現場，蘇晚的笑容定格。手機螢幕閃回——發送匿名訊息的號碼，正是蘇晚自己的另一支手機。黑屏。字幕浮現：「這場婚禮，從來就不是婚禮。」
scenes.action_en: Camera slowly pushes in to an extreme close-up of Su Wan's face. She smiles faintly — not a bride's joyful smile, but a hunter's cold satisfaction. Cross-dissolve to one week earlier: Su Wan sits in a dim room, speaking into a voice recorder, Lu Shen's schedule and Su Yao's missing-person report spread before her. Cut back to the wedding: Su Wan's smile freezes in frame. Flash to the phone screen — the number that sent the anonymous message is Su Wan's own second phone. Black screen. Text fades in: 'This wedding was never a wedding.'
scenes.dialogue_zh:
蘇晚（一週前錄音，畫外音）：姐，我會讓他親手把證據帶到我面前。他會穿上最體面的衣服，站在最多人面前，然後……親手毀掉自己。
（字幕：這場婚禮，從來就不是婚禮。）
scenes.dialogue_en:
Su Wan (recording from one week ago, V.O.): Sis, I'll make him bring the evidence to me with his own hands. He'll wear his finest suit, stand before the most witnesses, and then... destroy himself. 
(Title card: This wedding was never a wedding.)
scenes.camera_angle: slow push-in extreme close-up → flashback wide → black

subtitle_zh: （畫外音）從這一刻起，你只剩三分鐘。
……無論順境逆境，我都願與你共度餘生。
（手機訊息：新郎殺了你姐姐，證據在他西裝內袋。）
（蘇晚低語）姐姐失蹤那天……你在哪裡？／（陸深低語）晚晚，你在說什麼？今天是我們的大日子。
感謝所有人見證這一刻。但今天，我想讓一個無法到場的人……也被記住。我的姐姐，蘇遙——她兩年前失蹤了。她最後一次被人看見的時候……戴著一條很特別的項鏈。
這條項鏈……是姐姐失蹤那天戴的。它為什麼……在我丈夫的口袋裡？／不……這不是……你不明白——！
你設計我——！你從一開始就——／從一開始？不。是從姐姐消失的那一天開始。
（錄音畫外音）姐，我會讓他親手把證據帶到我面前。他會穿上最體面的衣服，站在最多人面前，然後……親手毀掉自己。／（字幕：這場婚禮，從來就不是婚禮。）
subtitle_en: (V.O.) From this moment, you have three minutes.
...for better or for worse, I will spend the rest of my life with you.
(Phone message: The groom killed your sister. The evidence is in his jacket pocket.)
(Su Wan whispers) The day my sister disappeared... where were you? / (Lu Shen whispers) Wan, what are you talking about? Today is our big day.

Thank you all for witnessing this moment. But today, I want someone who couldn't be here... to also be remembered. My sister, Su Yao — she disappeared two years ago. The last time anyone saw her... she was wearing a very special necklace.
This necklace... is the one my sister wore the day she vanished. Why... was it in my husband's pocket? / No... this isn't... you don't understand—!
You set me up—! From the very start you— / From the start? No. From the day my sister disappeared.

(Recording V.O.) Sis, I'll make him bring the evidence to me with his own hands. He'll wear his finest suit, stand before the most witnesses, and then... destroy himself. / (Title card: This wedding was never a wedding.)

characters.name: 蘇晚（Su Wan）
characters.hair: 黑色長髮盤起新娘髮髻（black hair in bridal updo）
characters.outfit: 白色魚尾婚紗，腰間繡有姐姐名字縮寫的暗紋（white mermaid wedding gown with hidden monogram embroidery）
characters.personality: 外表溫婉柔順，內心極度冷靜，擅長隱忍後致命一擊
characters.arc: 從疑似受害者到真正的掌局者

characters.name: 陸深（Lu Shen）
characters.hair: 短髮側分，精心打理（short side-parted hair, well-groomed）
characters.outfit: 黑色三件式西裝禮服，胸口白玫瑰胸花（black three-piece tuxedo with white rose boutonniere）
characters.personality: 表面儒雅體貼，實則控制欲極強，擅長偽裝情緒
characters.arc: 從完美新郎到被剝開的偽裝者

characters.name: 蘇遙（Su Yao）
characters.hair: 不出場，僅出現在手機照片中（appears only in phone photos）
characters.outfit: 照片中穿紅色洋裝（red dress in photo）
